facts: Dogs like to chew bones but cooked bones and bones that can splinter such as cooked chicken bones should not be given to dogs.
The most intelligent breed of dog is the Border Collie.
Fifty-eight percent of people put pets in family and holiday portraits.
Dogs can develop a fear of certain objects or situations if they have a negative experience with them.
The Labrador is so popular, in 2006 there were approximately 3-5 times more Labs as there were German Shepherds or Golden Retrievers.
